name: Beef Burgundy
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat in olive oil in a 5-quart Dutch oven.
2. Add onions and garlic and cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms, bay leaf, thyme, Worcestershire sauce, and white pepper.
4. Add wine and water to the pot.
5. Cover and bake at 350°F for 2-3 hours or until meat is tender.
6. In a bowl, blend together flour and butter.
7. Stir the mixture into the stew.
8. Heat until boiling, then simmer until thickened.
Each serving contains about: 360 calories; 209 milligrams sodium; 108 milligrams cholesterol; 20 grams fat; 9 grams carbohydrates; 29 grams protein; 0.38 gram fiber.
